title: NFL Football Analytics
text:
Welcome
This is the online version of NFL Football Analytics.

title: Preface
text: This book is a personal project to explore NFL football analytics using R.

title: 3  Team Weekly Performance
text: This chapter covers team-level weekly performance statistics.

title: 4  Team Regular Season Statistics
text: This chapter covers team-level regular season statistics.

title: 5  Career-Based Statistics
text: This chapter covers career-level player statistics.

title: 6  Regression
text: This chapter introduces simple linear regression in the context of NFL analytics.
crumbs: Modelling Play, Player, and Team Performance

title: 7  Multiple Regression
text: This chapter covers multiple regression models applied to NFL data.
crumbs: Modelling Play, Player, and Team Performance

title: 8  Generalized Linear Models
text: This chapter covers generalized linear models (GLMs) applied to NFL data.
crumbs: Modelling Play, Player, and Team Performance

title: 9  Generalized Linear Mixed Models
text: This chapter covers generalized linear mixed models (GLMMs) applied to NFL data.
crumbs: Modelling Play, Player, and Team Performance

title: 10  Bayesian Statistics and Hierarchical Models
text: This chapter introduces Bayesian statistical methods and hierarchical models.
crumbs: 10  Bayesian Statistics and Hierarchical Models

title: 11  Machine Learning: Advanced Approaches
text: This chapter covers advanced machine learning approaches in the context of NFL analytics.

title: 12  PCA: Dimensionality Reduction
text: This chapter covers Principal Component Analysis (PCA) as a dimensionality reduction technique.

title: 13  Cluster Analysis: Interpretable Proximity
text: This chapter covers cluster analysis methods applied to NFL data.

title: 14  Factor Analysis: Interpretable Latent Variable Identification
text: This chapter covers factor analysis applied to NFL data.
crumbs: 14  Factor Analysis: Interpretable Latent Variable Identification

title: 15  Time-Series Models
text: This chapter covers time-series modelling approaches applied to NFL data.

title: 16  Machine Learning
text: This chapter provides a comprehensive treatment of machine learning methods for NFL analytics.

title: 17  Causal Inference
text: This chapter covers causal inference methods in the context of NFL analytics.

title: 18  Prediction and Forecasting
text: This chapter covers prediction and forecasting methods applied to NFL data.

title: GitHub, Git Pages, and Version Control
text: This appendix covers the use of GitHub, GitHub Pages, and version control for reproducible research.
crumbs: GitHub, Git Pages, and Version Control

title: Statistical Modelling
text: This appendix provides supplementary notes on statistical modelling concepts.

title: NFL Analytics Notes
text: This appendix contains supplementary notes on NFL analytics concepts and data sources.

title: R Notes
text: This appendix provides supplementary notes on R programming relevant to the book.
